// HGR Bestiary browser -- 6 SCROLL-O-SPRITES categories, in colour
//   CREATURES TROLLKIND UNLIVING FAUNA MAGICK MUSIC (54 sprites)
//   Per-slot diagonal rainbow (green/orange/blue/violet).
//   SPACE = next category, ESC = quit. Run: E000R
